description: Phase 1.7 point-lookup hardening: calendar questions whose answer is one exact date/range among near-identical neighbouring rows. Each has forbidden_facts = the adjacent distractor row. Facts source-verified against VinUni-Academic-Calendar.pdf (v5/25/2026, page 1). Held-out, student-phrased.

cases.question: When is the end-of-semester course evaluation period for Summer 2027?
cases.golden_answer: The Summer 2027 end-of-semester course evaluation period runs from August 16 through August 20, 2027.
cases.evidence: 16-20 Aug End-of-Semester Course Evaluation Period - Summer'27 (distractor: 23-27 Aug Final Exam Period)

cases.question: When does course registration for Summer 2027 start?
cases.golden_answer: Summer 2027 class enrollment (course registration) starts on June 21, 2027.
cases.evidence: 21-Jun Summer'27 Class Enrollment Starts (distractor: 14-Jun Summer'27 Class Timetable Release)

cases.question: When will the Spring 2027 final exam schedule be released?
cases.golden_answer: The Spring 2027 final exam schedule is released on May 3, 2027.
cases.evidence: 3-May Final Exam Schedule Release (distractor: 28-May Last Day of Instruction)

cases.question: What is the Spring 2027 Add, Transfer Credit, and Independent Study deadline?
cases.golden_answer: The Spring 2027 Add, Transfer Credit, and Independent Study deadline is February 26, 2027.
cases.evidence: 26-Feb Add/Transfer Credit/Independent Study Deadline (distractor: 5-Mar Course Drop Deadline)

cases.question: When is Convocation Day in the 2026-2027 academic calendar?
cases.golden_answer: The calendar tentatively lists Convocation Day on September 26, 2026.

cases.question: When is the end-of-semester course evaluation period for Fall 2026?
cases.golden_answer: The Fall 2026 end-of-semester course evaluation period runs from December 21 through December 31, 2026.
cases.evidence: 21-31 Dec End-of-Semester Course Evaluation Period - Fall'26 (distractor: 11-22 Jan Final Exam Period)

cases.question: When are Fall 2026 grades released (the marking, appeal, and grade release period)?
cases.golden_answer: The Fall 2026 marking, appeal, and grade release period runs from January 25 through February 12, 2027.
cases.evidence: 25-Jan-12-Feb Marking + Appeal + Grade release (distractor: 11-22 Jan Final Exam Period)

cases.question: Thời gian chấm điểm, phúc khảo và công bố điểm của học kỳ Fall 2026 diễn ra khi nào?
cases.golden_answer: Thời gian chấm điểm, phúc khảo và công bố điểm của Fall 2026 diễn ra từ ngày 25 tháng 1 đến ngày 12 tháng 2 năm 2027.
cases.evidence: 25-Jan-12-Feb Marking + Appeal + Grade release (distractor: 11-22 Jan Final Exam Period)

cases.question: When is the Lunar New Year holiday in the 2026-2027 academic calendar?
cases.golden_answer: The calendar tentatively lists the Lunar New Year holiday from February 2 through February 10, 2027.

cases.question: When is Graduation Day in the 2026-2027 calendar?
cases.golden_answer: The calendar tentatively lists Graduation Day on June 26, 2027.

cases.question: On what date does the 2026-2027 calendar mark Hung Kings' Commemoration Day?
cases.golden_answer: The calendar marks Hung Kings' Commemoration Day on April 16, 2027.

cases.question: When is Vietnam Culture Day in the 2026-2027 academic calendar?
cases.golden_answer: The calendar tentatively lists Vietnam Culture Day on November 24, 2026.

cases.question: Ngày Văn hóa Việt Nam trong lịch năm học 2026-2027 dự kiến là khi nào?
cases.golden_answer: Lịch dự kiến Ngày Văn hóa Việt Nam vào ngày 24 tháng 11 năm 2026.

cases.question: When are Spring 2027 grades released (the marking, appeal, and grade release period)?
cases.golden_answer: The Spring 2027 marking, appeal, and grade release period runs from June 21 through July 2, 2027.
cases.evidence: 21-Jun-02-Jul Marking + Appeal + Grade release (distractor: 7-18 Jun Final Exam Period)

cases.question: When are Summer 2027 grades released (the marking, appeal, and grade release period)?
cases.golden_answer: The Summer 2027 marking, appeal, and grade release period runs from August 30 through September 10, 2027.
cases.evidence: 30-Aug-10-Sep Marking + Appeal + Grade release (distractor: 23-27 Aug Final Exam Period)

cases.question: When is Orientation Week for Fall 2026?
cases.golden_answer: Orientation Week for Fall 2026 runs from September 14 through September 18, 2026.

cases.question: On what date does the 2026-2027 calendar mark Victory Day?
cases.golden_answer: The calendar marks Victory Day on April 30, 2027.

cases.question: Theo lịch năm học 2026-2027, ngày Giải phóng miền Nam (Victory Day) là ngày nào?
cases.golden_answer: Theo lịch, ngày Giải phóng miền Nam là ngày 30 tháng 4 năm 2027.
